nasb.text: As for the portions of fat from the ox and from the ram, the fat tail, and the fat covering, and the kidneys and the lobe of the liver,

esv.text: But the fat pieces of the ox and of the ram, the fat tail and that which covers the entrails and the kidneys and the long lobe of the liver—

cnv.text: 他們又把公牛和公綿羊的脂肪、肥尾巴、遮蓋內臟的脂肪、兩個腎和肝葉，

ccb.text: 他们把公牛和公绵羊的脂肪，即肥尾巴、遮盖内脏的脂肪、肾脏和肝叶，
